title: anemonastrum rupestre subsp. gelidum
intro: Anemonastrum rupestre subsp. gelidum, also known as Chinese caterpillar fungus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It is a parasitic plant that derives its nutrients from the roots of certain species of fungi. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Anemonastrum rupestre subsp. gelidum include improving immune function, reducing inflammation, and potentially treating certain types of cancer, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and teas, although its effectiveness and safety have not been thoroughly scientifically proven.
